query: Onboard a new engineer: set up access, add to HR system, create Jira account.
rubric: Response must delegate to both HR and IT sub-agents and confirm all three tasks are addressed.

query: Generate a Q3 performance report and email it to the leadership team.
rubric: Response must produce a structured report and confirm email action.

query: Find all open IT tickets older than 7 days and escalate them.
rubric: Response must identify the tickets and describe the escalation action taken.

query: Set up a new project: create GCS bucket, Firestore collection, and add team members.
rubric: Response must address all three infrastructure tasks and confirm completion.

query: Check if we are within budget for cloud costs this month and alert if over 80%.
rubric: Response must query cost data and produce a clear budget status with threshold comparison.
